upload.dropzone: Drag and drop your document here
upload.errorUnsupported: Unsupported file format. Please select a PDF, DOCX, DOC, PPTX, or PPT file.
upload.errorTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

configure.title: Translation Configuration
configure.sameLangError: Source and target languages cannot be the same
configure.glossaryDescription: Add specialized terms for more accurate translation
configure.savedGlossaryEmpty: No saved glossaries match the current language pair and domain.
configure.manualTermsHelper: Add key terms to override wording for this translation.
configure.termPairWarning: Fill both source and translation to apply this term.
configure.emptyManualHint: Add term pairs when you need strict wording control.
configure.nearLimitWarning: You are close to the manual term limit (20).
configure.noTerms: No terms added yet. Click the button below to add.

estimate.title: Credit estimate
estimate.note: Estimate may vary slightly based on final extracted content.
estimate.insufficientActionHint: Please buy more credits before starting translation.

fonts.title: Fonts
fonts.description: Review parsed fonts and choose replacements for the target language.
fonts.metadataUnavailable: Font metadata is unavailable right now. You can still continue without custom font mapping.
fonts.parsingUnsupported: This file type does not support font parsing. Translation can continue without font configuration.
fonts.empty: All fonts already support the target language well.
fonts.checkUnavailable: Font compatibility check is currently unavailable. You can still continue and let the backend apply its own validation.
fonts.checking: Checking font compatibility for the selected target language...
fonts.groupCount: {count, plural, one {# parsed font} other {# parsed fonts}}
fonts.expandedHint: Choose which fonts to replace before starting translation.
fonts.collapsedHint: Custom font replacement is turned off. The original font mapping will be kept.
fonts.fontSizeToggleDescription: Turn on to keep the original font size, or turn off to slightly reduce it and help prevent content overflow.
fonts.supportedLocked: This font already works for the selected target language, so replacement is locked.
fonts.noCandidates: No replacement candidates were returned for this font.

review.title: Translation Result
review.preparingHint: Confirming upload and creating translation job
review.translatingHint: This may take a few minutes depending on document size
review.successHint: Your document has been translated and is ready to download

preview.title: Side-by-side file comparison
preview.description: Review the original file and its translation in two independent panes.
preview.renderError: Unable to render the preview. Please try downloading the file to review it.
preview.missingJobDescription: No jobId was provided for the preview screen.
preview.loadErrorDescription: An error occurred while loading the document data for preview.
preview.notReadyDescription: The translation job is not finished yet or there is no output file to display.
preview.unsupportedDescription: Preview is available only when the translation job has both original and translated files ready for PDF rendering.

translationResult.successHint: Your document has been translated successfully
